description_long: This is a large, L-shaped sectional sofa with a modern, minimalist design, upholstered in a light beige fabric. The sofa features three main seat sections and an extended chaise lounge on the left side, providing ample seating space. The backrest is composed of three large, plush cushions, with additional loose, darker brown throw pillows arranged in the corner for added comfort and visual contrast. The armrests are straight, low, and boxy, matching the overall geometric profile of the sofa. The seat and back cushions appear thick and generously padded, contributing to a soft and inviting appearance. The sofa sits low to the ground, with no visible legs, giving it a grounded and contemporary look suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, lounges, or public waiting areas.
description: A large, L-shaped beige sectional sofa with plush seat and back cushions, accented by dark brown throw pillows and low, boxy armrests. The design is modern and inviting, with a soft, fabric-upholstered finish.
description_view_0: Side view highlighting the chaise lounge extension and the arrangement of dark brown throw pillows in the corner.
description_view_1: Top-down view showing the full L-shaped layout, three main seat sections, and the placement of all cushions and pillows.
description_view_2: Opposite side view emphasizing the length of the main seating area and the alignment of the back cushions and pillows.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the sofa's overall rectangular profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, loose seat cushions and three matching back cushions, with three smaller, loose throw pillows in the corner; all cushions are uniform in size and thickness, arranged in a sectional layout.
attribute_armrest_style: Low, straight, and boxy armrests present on both ends of the sofa, matching the seat height and featuring a simple, padded design with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the sofa base appears to rest directly on the floor, giving a grounded, monolithic appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, and continuous backrest formed by three large, loose cushions with no visible tufting or segmentation beyond the cushion separations.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, smooth fabric upholstery in a light beige color with no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
